checkIn.title: 🔑 Check-in Process
steps: Arrive at the building entrance on Main Street
Use the access code 1234# to enter the building
Take the elevator to the 5th floor
Your apartment is Unit 5B - the key is in the lockbox by the door

checkOut.title: 🚪 Check-out Process
steps: Please leave the apartment by 11:00 AM
Ensure all windows and doors are closed and locked
Turn off all lights and appliances
Place the key back in the lockbox and scramble the code
Take all trash to the disposal area on the ground floor

checkInOut.tip: 💡 Tip: If you need early check-in or late check-out, please contact us at least 24 hours in advance.

rules.title: No Smoking
rules.description: Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the apartment

rules.title: Pets Policy
rules.description: Small pets welcome with prior approval and deposit

rules.title: Quiet Hours
rules.description: Please keep noise to a minimum between 10 PM - 8 AM

rules.title: No Parties
rules.description: Events and parties are not permitted

rules.title: Recycling
rules.description: Please separate recyclables - bins are under the sink

importantNote.title: ⚠️ Important
importantNote.message: Violation of house rules may result in immediate termination of your stay without refund.

amenities.name: Kitchen
amenities.description: Fully equipped with dishwasher, microwave, oven, and refrigerator
amenities.instructions: Coffee maker uses standard filters. Dishwasher pods are under the sink.

amenities.name: Washer & Dryer
amenities.instructions: Detergent provided. Use cold water for colors, warm for whites.

amenities.name: Smart TV
amenities.description: 55" 4K TV with Netflix, Hulu, and Disney+
amenities.instructions: Remote is on the coffee table. Press "Home" to access apps.

amenities.name: Air Conditioning
amenities.instructions: Thermostat is in the hallway. Please keep between 68-76°F.

amenities.name: Heating
amenities.instructions: Use the same thermostat. Heat mode activates automatically.

amenities.name: Parking
amenities.description: One dedicated parking spot in the garage
amenities.instructions: Spot #5B on Level 2. Use your building access code for garage entry.

recommendations.name: City Park
recommendations.description: Beautiful park with walking trails and lake

localGuide.tip: 🗺️ Getting Around: The subway station is 2 blocks away. Uber and Lyft are readily available.

alert.title: 🚨 In Case of Emergency
alert.message: For life-threatening emergencies, always call 911 first.

safetyInfo.title: 🔥 Safety Equipment
items: Fire extinguisher: Under the kitchen sink
Emergency exits: Fire escape on the balcony, main door
Smoke detectors: Installed in each room (test monthly)

emergency.addressNote: 📍 Address for Emergency Services: 123 Main Street, Unit 5B, City, State 12345
